kill_fact: I tried to kill this on three vectors and each held against a primary source. (1) CATALYST FIRED/SLIPPED? No — the deal is live, unbroken, and dated: Allied's own 2026-06-10 GlobeNewswire release describes 'Normal Course Progress with Zijin Gold Arrangement' (deal NOT closed and NOT broken as of mid-June), and the 2026-05-29 release (also filed as a 6-K) fixes the hard outside date at 2026-07-29 with the exact load-bearing language 'Any further extension of the Outside Date will require the parties' mutual agreement.' (2) TARGET REAL? Yes — C$44.00/share all-cash is the contractual consideration in a signed plan of arrangement (Jan-26 agreement, shareholders approved 2026-03-31); the target is the cash you receive, not a model. (3) FLOOR REAL? Yes — a break strips the 27% premium but not the gold ounces; no financing-out, no CVR, no going-concern/ATM flagged, so the standalone-miner floor is structural. The single residual binary (China NDRC outbound-investment approval, delayed over premium + Mali risk) is correctly identified as the ONLY outstanding gate and is a real-but-PRICED sovereign-discretion risk, not a disqualifier. The wide ~21% spread is the market paying for that live binary, exactly as the dossier claims. No hidden trading-through-terms, no second-request surprise, no fabricated floor.
corrections: None load-bearing. Note the deal value in USD floats with USD/CAD (target ~$31.08 at 1.4146 is FX-sensitive, not a fixed number) and the NDRC decision can resolve at any moment before the 2026-07-29 wall — verify NDRC status at entry, as a clearance headline snaps the spread shut and a rejection takes it to the floor. Live price/FX should be refreshed at sizing.
evidence: Allied Gold, 'Allied Gold Advances Receipt of Regulatory Approvals... and Extends the Outside Date to July 29, 2026,' GlobeNewswire/6-K, 2026-05-29 — confirms ICA, ECOWAS, COMESA clearances obtained; new outside date 2026-07-29; 'Any further extension of the Outside Date will require the parties' mutual agreement.'

Allied Gold, 'Allied Gold Provides Update on Continued Value Creation... in Parallel with Normal Course Progress with Zijin Gold Arrangement,' GlobeNewswire, 2026-06-10 — confirms deal still live/unbroken and progressing as of mid-June 2026 (not closed, not terminated).
Allied Gold Corp Form 6-K (SEC EDGAR, CIK 0001993344) — definitive arrangement with Zijin Gold International at C$44.00/share cash (~C$5.5B), 27% premium; shareholders approved 2026-03-31.

Investing News Network / Financial Times, 'Chinese Regulator Delays Zijin Gold's US$4 Billion Allied Gold Takeover,' 2026-06-02 — NDRC delay is the sole outstanding gate, citing concerns over the premium paid and Mali (~half of output) geopolitical risk; the reason for the May→July outside-date extension.
